React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'field', 'onUpdate', and 'section.id'. Either include them or remove the dependency array. If 'onUpdate' changes too often, find the parent component that defines it and wrap that definition in useCallback.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [field, isPanning, onUpdate, panStart, section.id]
